name: openEuler SIG Guidance Principles | SIG Zone | openEuler
description: Review the guidance principles for openEuler SIGs, and learn about participation and contribution methods.

name: How to Apply for Creating an openEuler SIG
description: Review the guidance principles for openEuler SIGs, and learn about participation and contribution methods.

step.name: Submit Application
step.text: Submit a PR to the openEuler/community repository to create a SIG, filling in basic information and objectives.

step.name: Technical Committee Review
step.text: The openEuler Technical Committee (TC) reviews the SIG application, evaluating technical direction and community value.

step.name: Build the Team
step.text: After approval, form the initial SIG team and appoint Maintainers and Committers.

step.name: Start Operations
step.text: The SIG is officially established, starting regular meetings, code contributions, and release work.
